summary: Vite 8 Colors Support feature testing complete. All tests passed. The /colors page renders correctly with OKLCH color scales, color-mix() derived colors, social platform colors, chart palette, live preview, and technical details. Vite 8 production build succeeds with Lightning CSS minifier. Existing pages (/, /login) work correctly after index.css theme changes.
critical_code_review_comments: vite.config.js correctly configured with css.lightningcss.drafts.customMedia, build.cssTarget, and build.cssMinify settings
index.css @theme block properly defines ~100 OKLCH color tokens including brand, gold, success, warning, info, danger, surface scales
color-mix() derived colors (brand-muted, gold-soft, etc.) correctly defined using oklch color space
ColorSystemPage.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for all sections enabling robust testing
Click-to-copy functionality works on color swatches
App.js correctly imports ColorSystemPage as lazy component and routes to /colors
package.json includes start:no-color and build:no-color scripts for ANSI terminal color control
seed_data_creation: None required - public page with no data dependencies
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vite 8 Colors Support feature fully implemented and tested. The /colors page is a public route showing OKLCH color palette with color-mix() derived utilities. All color scales (brand, gold, success, warning, info, danger, surface) render with visible swatches. Live Preview section shows Brand Card, Gold Accent Card, and Status Badges. Technical Details section explains OKLCH, Lightning CSS, and terminal color configuration. Vite 8 build with Lightning CSS minifier works correctly.

color_system_page.Social Platform Colors: PASS - data-testid='social-colors' found (Spotify, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Twitter/X, Facebook, SoundCloud, Apple Music)
color_system_page.Chart Palette: PASS - data-testid='chart-palette' found (6 perceptually uniform colors)
color_system_page.Live Preview section: PASS - data-testid='live-preview' found with Brand Card, Gold Accent Card, Status Badges
color_system_page.Technical Details section: PASS - data-testid='tech-info' found with OKLCH, Lightning CSS, terminal color info
color_system_page.Usage Guide section: PASS - data-testid='usage-guide' found with Tailwind class examples
color_system_page.Click-to-copy functionality: PASS - 'Copied!' text appears on swatch click

existing_pages.Home page (/): PASS - Renders correctly with navigation bar
existing_pages.Login page (/login): PASS - Form renders with email, password inputs and submit button

test_credentials_used: None required - /colors is a public route
mocked_data_note: NO MOCKED APIs - Color System page is static UI with no backend dependencies
